THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JOSE EDUARDO MORENO $2,295.34 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,400.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
